name: Patient 15
history: Ongoing workplace underappreciation. Repeated experiences of ideas not being accepted.
intermediate_belief: My contributions don't matter; I'm invisible here.
intermediate_belief_depression: I'll never be recognized no matter how hard I work.
situation: Colleagues praise a coworker and ask patient for help with tech issues for that coworker.
auto_thought: "They only value me for tech support. My ideas are worthless."
behavior: Helps reluctantly with minimal effort, makes sarcastic comment, withdraws from conversation.
